title: Sakana Fugu (Fully Tested - V/S Fable): UHM... REALLY?
summary: Sakana Fugu is a learned router and multi-agent orchestration system available in two versions. It benchmarks competitively on Terminal Bench, LiveCodeBench, and GPQA Diamond but underperforms Fable 5 on SWE Bench Pro and shows mixed results in practical coding and visual generation tasks.
